degree: Higher Technician for Development and Management of Biomedical IT Solutions (TIB)
description: Two-year technical diploma in biomedical informatics and software development. Covered full-stack development, database management, and medical software standards, with a 6-month internship at CodaQ S.r.l.s. building healthcare applications.

institution: Istituto Tecnico Statale "Grazia Deledda - Max Fabiani"
degree: High School Diploma in Chemistry, Materials, and Biotechnology
description: Technical high school in chemistry, materials science, and biotechnology. Heavy on scientific methodology and lab work.
